project_milestones.Needle: Fine-tuned 26M JAX/Flax model completed. Dataset augmented from 16 to 150 samples. Last active: 2026-05-16.
project_milestones.Three_Kingdoms_Map: Angular+NgRx+Leaflet webapp live at GitHub Pages. Events expanded to 91 with full Traditional Chinese event corpus. README with screenshots hosted. Last commit: 2026-05-23.
project_milestones.Fiscal5Eye: Stock analysis skills and SOP documented. Report format refined. Status: maintenance, no recent activity since 2026-03-17.
project_milestones.Taonix: V27 hunter report — Mobile Agentic Expansion identified as core industry pivot.
project_milestones.Inference: JAX/Flax runtime verified on CPU. Local tool-calling pipeline operational.
project_milestones.PineScript-v6: Auto-hunter operational, v6 compliance enforced (request.security replacing strategy.*), vwap_regime_deviation_v6 strategy materialized and versioned.

high_signal_insights.insight: Three Kingdoms interactive map project reached production deployment on GitHub Pages with 91 curated historical events. Full Traditional Chinese corpus with Leaflet visualization.
high_signal_insights.actionable: Continue event curation pipeline. Consider adding filter/sort UI and mobile responsive polish.

high_signal_insights.insight: FFN-less architecture (SAN) redefines edge AI agent viability. Intent recognition and tool calling can run fully offline without cloud dependencies.
high_signal_insights.actionable: Enforce 'local routing first' discipline — route ROAS scraping and sensitive API calls through local Needle inference.

high_signal_insights.insight: Mobile Agent expansion aligns with Needle's local execution capability. Sovereign systems shifting toward zero-latency, high-privacy operation.
high_signal_insights.actionable: Prepare INT4 quantization of fine-tuned weights to reduce response latency to sub-100ms.

high_signal_insights.insight: Disk usage increased from 70% to 75% (333G/468G) since last snapshot. System cleanup needed to prevent re-approaching critical threshold.
high_signal_insights.actionable: Run system-cleanup scripts. Evaluate archiving or pruning hermes-agent and DeepTutor git object stores.

high_signal_insights.insight: Pine Script v6 compliance enforced. strategy.* calls fully replaced with request.security. Auto-hunter strategy vwap_regime_deviation_v6 verified in production.
high_signal_insights.actionable: Monitor TradingView v6 spec updates; ensure automated hunter strategies remain compliant.

audit_memo: 5/23 23:30 CST 排程執行。三國地圖正式上線 GitHub Pages (91 events)。磁碟從 70% 升至 75% (333G/468G)，需要清理。Needle 自 5/16 後無新提交。Fiscal5Eye 自 3/17 後停滯。舊支柱專案 (social-sentiment, physical-intel, crypto-market, tech-scouting, institutional-policy) 自 3 月底後無更新，標記為 HIBERNATED。系統清理腳本存在於 projects/system-cleanup。
